items.title: Dashboard metrics enforce tenant and location scope
items.precondition: Hermetic Express app with synthetic organization and location fixtures
steps: 1. Request GET /api/dashboard/metrics with an authenticated organization and a foreign locationId
2. Request the same endpoint with an accessible locationId and a forged organization_id query value
items.expected: Foreign location is denied with the canonical envelope; forged organization_id is ignored; missing location receives the typed 400 response
items.notes: No live database or tenant data was used.

items.title: Choosable metrics use only finalized active competitor sets
items.precondition: Synthetic location, onboarding, review, and competitor fixtures
steps: 2. Exercise pending, curating, finalized-empty, and finalized-ready competitor states
3. Exercise a model failure and the 550 versus 100/1,000 median/leader edge case
items.expected: Not-ready, unavailable, median standing, and true review leadership remain distinct and correctly typed
items.evidence: src/__tests__/choosable-metrics.test.ts — 7/7 passed; oldest discovery timestamp and 550-vs-1,000 semantics asserted
items.notes: No agent run or external query occurred.

items.title: Summary comparison evidence rejects fabricated or contradictory copy
items.precondition: Synthetic Summary v2 output and dashboard metrics dictionary
steps: 1. Validate grounded new output and a legacy output without domain evidence
2. Substitute an invented competitor, count, and source field
3. Try false leadership, wrong median wording, and evidence from a not-ready source
items.expected: Grounded and compatible legacy output pass; every fabricated or contradictory comparison fails closed
items.evidence: src/__tests__/summary-v2-validators.test.ts — 8/8 passed, including the numeric-versus-string regression found during this pass
items.notes: The test pass exposed and verified the fix for nonnumeric evidence values coercing to zero.

items.title: Practice Hub uses only the newest grounded Summary comparison
items.precondition: Synthetic Summary tasks and mocked dashboard contexts under jsdom
steps: 1. Keep an older high-priority Summary for the one-thing hero while supplying a newer grounded Summary
2. Supply a newer legacy Summary without evidence while an older grounded comparison exists
3. Render grounded, loading, error, empty, and onboarding states
items.expected: Hero priority stays unchanged; comparison comes only from the newest Summary; no stale fallback or false comparison renders; no CTA is present
items.notes: Scoped frontend ESLint passed with zero errors or warnings.

items.title: Alloro Docs matches the new Practice Hub strip
items.precondition: Alloro Docs running locally at http://127.0.0.1:4175/docs/practice-hub
steps: 2. Inspect the replica below the one-thing banner
3. Confirm the comparison copy, absence of a CTA, and step/hotspot order
items.expected: The static replica shows one compact local-review comparison as step 5 and the stat tiles continue as steps 6–9
items.evidence: Alloro Docs build passed; browser DOM and full-page visual inspection completed on 2026-07-14
items.notes: The docs replica is static and does not claim that every customer already has new Summary evidence.

items.title: Fresh generated Summary appears on the real client Practice Hub
items.precondition: PR code deployed to dev, a safe dev backend, and explicit authorization to generate a new location-scoped Summary for One Endodontics
steps: 1. Open /admin on dev and Pilot into One Endodontics
2. Generate or select a new Summary produced after this contract is deployed
3. Open the Practice Hub and inspect the local review comparison
4. Confirm the copy matches the persisted Summary evidence and the newest generation
items.expected: A grounded comparison appears only for the newly generated Summary; legacy summaries continue to show no strip
items.evidence: Not run: the isolated worktree has no runtime .env or backend listener, and agent reruns/deployment remain outside the authorized test scope.
items.notes: This must remain pending until dev deployment and explicit Summary-rerun authorization. It is not a code-test failure.
